Patch Set 2:

Hi Pam,

As the model-yaml is deprecated now, where should the new TargetType info go?

> Hi Pam,
> 
> As the model-yaml is deprecated now, where should the new TargetType info go?

If all you need to do is add the String, that goes in ControlLoopTargetType (policy-models).  Should probably make it "SERVICE_INSTANCE" instead of "SERVICEINSTANCE".  Although, I do wonder if it should just be plain "SERVICE".
